title: Story Edge
description: Directed edge representing relationship between nodes in the story graph

from_type.description: Type of the source node (record, event, quant, or theme)

to_type.description: Type of the target node (record, event, quant, or theme)

relationship.description: Nature of the relationship: supports (confirms), extends (builds on), quant_context (quant data explains), contradicts (conflicts), duplicate_theme (same theme, different coverage)
